changeSet.author: patrick.heusser

insert.column: Track metadata and derived track attributes
Rendered and analytical track geometry variants
Media files and their location metadata

changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness(p_domain_key text) RETURNS void AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO data_freshness(domain_key, revision, changed_at) VALUES (p_domain_key, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (domain_key) DO UPDATE SET revision = data_freshness.revision + 1, changed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER gps_track_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('tracks')
CREATE TRIGGER gps_track_data_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track_data FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('track_geometry')
CREATE TRIGGER media_file_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON media_file FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('media')
CREATE TRIGGER filter_config_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON filter_config FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('filters')
CREATE TRIGGER config_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON config FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('config')
CREATE TRIGGER indexed_file_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON indexed_file FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_trigger('index')
